contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Autopilot: multi-account AWS, AI/proposed-fix labels (PR + Gmail), Bugsnag classifier
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/37
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/38
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/133
  
  Details:
  Three architectural extensions to truesight_autopilot after Gary asked to expand its operational reach.
  
  ## Shipped (4 merged PRs, all deployed to production)
  
  - truesight_autopilot PR #37: aws_monitor.py refactored from single-client to a list-of-accounts iterator. Account labels = DAO-member name (nelanco, explorya), so log lines identify whose contributed account each signal came from. Backwards-compat with legacy single-account env.
  - truesight_autopilot PR #38: github_client.open_pr() accepts labels=[...] and idempotently creates+attaches them. fix_agent.py's two PR-creation paths now pass labels=['AI/proposed fix']. email_poller.py adds Bugsnag classifier (BUGSNAG_SENDER + BUGSNAG_SUBJECTS regexes), v0 handler stub (parses project + error_class, logs only — PR-creation deferred to v0.1 pending Bugsnag-project → github-repo mapping). Also _apply_gmail_label helper that mirrors the GitHub label onto the source email when a PR is opened — single search string 'AI/proposed fix' works in both Gmail inbox and GitHub PR list.
  - agentic_ai_context PR #133: AUTOPILOT_CODE_MODIFICATIONS.md gets §8 (AWS multi-account), §9 (label sync), §10 (email classifier table + how-to-add-classifier recipe + Bugsnag v0.1 path).
  - (Earlier PRs #34 [implicit — health-degrade] and #36 already covered the Cypher → Nelanco/Explorya credential rewire and graceful Health-API degrade.)
  
  ## Production state confirmed
  - [nelanco] AWS CloudWatch connected (account 767697632458)
  - [explorya] AWS CloudWatch connected (account 440626669078)
  - Both accounts gracefully degrade Health API (no Business support on either)
  - Cost Explorer polling daily for both
  - Gmail token scope (gmail.modify) already covers users.labels.create + users.messages.modify — no re-auth needed for the label feature
  
  ## Operator UX win
  Single label name 'AI/proposed fix' works as a search filter in BOTH:
  - GitHub PR list (PRs awaiting Gary's review/approval)
  - Gmail inbox (source emails that triggered an autopilot fix PR)
  
  ## v0.1 follow-ups documented
  - Bugsnag fix_agent integration: needs operator-maintained BUGSNAG_PROJECT_REPOS mapping
  - gas_error and security_alert handlers still TODO (classified but no fix-path yet)
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/37
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/38
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/133
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
